title: Moraea pendula
taxonomy: Moraea pendula is classified within the family Iridaceae, which is a group of flowering plants commonly known as the iris family. This family is part of the larger order Asparagales, a diverse group of monocotyledonous flowering plants. Moraea pendula is also a member of the genus Moraea, which includes various species of irises that are native to southern Africa. The genus Moraea is further divided into several subgenera, with Moraea pendula belonging to the subgenus Moraea. The classification of Moraea pendula is essential for understanding its evolutionary relationships and for the conservation of this species.
